mnemonics: PDA-PAL (PushDown Automata for Parsing and Languages)
Chomsky's Hierarchy (Regular, Context-Free, Context-Sensitive, Recursively Enumerable)
keyPoints: Understand the differences between deterministic and non-deterministic models
Be able to prove a language is undecidable using reduction techniques
Know the closure properties of regular and context-free languages
commonMistakes: Incorrectly applying the pumping lemma for regular or context-free languages
Mixing up the capabilities of finite automata, pushdown automata, and Turing machines
